diagrams.title: DDA Algorithm Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows the step-by-step process of DDA line drawing from input endpoints to pixel plotting
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the sequential process of DDA algorithm

diagrams.title: Bresenham Algorithm Pixel Selection
diagrams.description: Illustrates how Bresenham chooses between East (E) and North-East (NE) pixels based on decision parameter
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the pixel selection logic in Bresenham's algorithm

diagrams.title: Line Drawing Results Comparison
diagrams.description: Compares pixel placements by DDA and Bresenham for the same endpoints showing nearly identical results
diagrams.purpose: Understanding that both algorithms produce similar visual output with different computational methods

diagrams.title: Aliasing vs Anti-aliasing
diagrams.description: Shows the visual difference between aliased (jagged) and anti-aliased (smooth) lines
diagrams.purpose: Understanding why anti-aliasing is important for quality graphics

visuals.title: Line Drawing Algorithms
visuals.description: Visual diagram for line drawing algorithms
